title: Upstart Q4 Earnings: Revenue Surges 56% to $219M, Projects $1B Revenue for 2025
text: Upstart announced fourth quarter 2024 results with revenue surging 56% to $219 million. The company projects $1 billion revenue for 2025. Q4 origination volume increased 89% year-over-year and 31% sequentially. Adjusted EBITDA reached $39 million. Full year 2024 net revenue was $637 million, up 24% year-over-year. 2025 guidance projects total revenues of approximately $1 billion with $920 million in fee revenue and adjusted EBITDA margin of 18%. The company introduced the Payment Transition Model in Q4 2024, improving accuracy by tracking intermediate delinquency states. New product growth accelerated with auto refinance improving 7x, HELOC growing 60% sequentially, and small-dollar relief surging 115% quarter-on-quarter. Balance sheet strength improved with $788 million in unrestricted cash. The company completed $1.3 billion in commitment upsizes and a $150 million personal loan warehouse facility, demonstrating capital partner confidence.
